title: Hydra Slack bot config
description: Controls bin/hydra-slack-bot — a Socket-Mode bot that DMs the operator on PR review-clean and accepts DMs from exactly one allowlisted Slack user. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-slack-bot.md and state/connectors/slack.json.example.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false the bot exits 0 on start with a clear log line — safe default.

bot_token_env.description: Name of the env var holding the Slack bot user OAuth token (xoxb-). Token itself never lives in this file.

app_token_env.description: Name of the env var holding the Slack app-level token (xapp-) required for Socket Mode.

allowed_user_id.description: Exactly ONE Slack user ID (U…). DMs from any other user are silently refused.

default_channel.description: Fallback Slack channel ID (C… D… G…) for proactive notifications when DMing the user directly fails.

notification_poll_interval_sec.description: Seconds between polls for commander-review-clean PRs. Minimum 30 to respect GitHub rate limits.

repos.description: Which <owner>/<repo> slugs to poll for the commander-review-clean label.

seen_prs_state_path.description: Where to persist the PR-IDs-already-notified set. LRU-capped at 500 entries.
